title: SaveOurs system development
summary: Product and platform architecture for a living museum built around what people create, collect and remember.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on defining the system model, boundaries, structure, workflows or intended operation.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on meaning, recognition, identity, visual language or the designed human experience.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Brand and experience-system responsibility: Product and platform architecture for a living museum built around what people create, collect and remember.

lensAssignments.rationale: This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on creating, managing, transforming or delivering media to an audience.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Media production and distribution responsibility: Product and platform architecture for a living museum built around what people create, collect and remember.
